etimesIs that FBI boss Kash Patel dancing barefoot to a Bollywood song? Truth behind viral videoA video of a man dancing to a Bollywood song went viral, with many online speculating it was FBI Director Kash Patel, following a hack of his personal emails by an Iran-linked group. Despite initial AI suggestions of resemblance, verification revealed the clip predates the hack and features an unrelated individual celebrating his wife's departure.

etimesWatch here: Entertainment turns scary as dancing robot slaps child during public showA robot demonstration in Shaanxi province took a concerning turn when a humanoid robot struck a young boy. The incident occurred during a dance routine, with the robot's arm hitting the child who was standing nearby. Staff intervened to stop the machine. The event has raised questions about safety measures at public tech demonstrations as robots become more prevalent.

etimesWatch: Flier walks through airport wearing cat like a hat, video goes viralA video shows a traveller calmly walking through Tampa airport with a cat perched on their head. The unusual sight has gone viral online, sparking amusement and disbelief. Many viewers shared their own stressful airport experiences in contrast to the traveller's ease. The cat's remarkable calmness in an unfamiliar environment has also drawn significant attention and online commentary.
